steps.title: Read the times from the table
steps.content: The table shows: Task A = 8 minutes, Task B = 5 minutes, Task C = 12 minutes, Task D = 10 minutes, Task E = 10 minutes.

steps.title: Calculate the mean
steps.content:
Sum all five times and divide by 5:
$$\text{mean} = \frac{8 + 5 + 12 + 10 + 10}{5} = \frac{45}{5} = 9$$
The mean time is 9 minutes. That matches choice B — B is correct.
